title: Error Pattern Catalog (v1) — canonical in agent-ready
description: Regex catalog for detecting missing-capability signals in raw agent trace text. Covers bash, zsh, PowerShell, network errors, auth failures, rate limits, and dependency errors. Canonical here; trace-eval v0.5.0 does not own this catalog (it uses a different, event-based detection model). See docs/INTEGRATION.md for the Phase 2 plan to bridge both.

patterns.human: The deployment tool (Vercel) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Look for 'command not found' containing 'vercel'.

patterns.human: The GitHub tool (gh CLI) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Look for 'command not found' containing 'gh' as a whole word.

patterns.human: Node.js isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Look for 'command not found' containing 'node'.

patterns.human: Python isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Look for 'command not found' containing 'python' or 'python3'.

patterns.human: You're not signed in to Vercel yet.
patterns.evidence_hint: Vercel output containing 'not logged in'.

patterns.human: You're not signed in to GitHub yet.
patterns.evidence_hint: Auth-failure messages from gh or git over HTTPS.

patterns.human: An API key is missing.
patterns.evidence_hint: Generic — requires context to disambiguate which service.

patterns.human: A Python dependency isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Python import error.

patterns.human: A Node dependency isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Node require/import error.

patterns.human: The deployment tool (Vercel) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: zsh shell reporting vercel is missing.

patterns.human: The GitHub tool (gh CLI) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: zsh shell reporting gh is missing.

patterns.human: Node.js isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: zsh shell reporting node is missing.

patterns.human: Python isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: zsh shell reporting python is missing.

patterns.human: The deployment tool (Vercel) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Windows PowerShell reporting vercel is missing.

patterns.human: The GitHub tool (gh CLI) isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Windows PowerShell reporting gh is missing.

patterns.human: Node.js isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Windows PowerShell reporting node is missing.

patterns.human: Python isn't installed.
patterns.evidence_hint: Windows PowerShell reporting python is missing.

patterns.human: A tool is installed but doesn't have permission to run.
patterns.evidence_hint: Permission denied on a tool executable. May need chmod or reinstall.

patterns.regex: (?i)(permission denied.*docker\.sock|connect to the Docker daemon socket)
patterns.human: Docker is installed but you don't have permission to use it.
patterns.evidence_hint: Docker daemon permission error. May need user added to docker group.

patterns.human: Node's package manager couldn install a tool.
patterns.evidence_hint: npm network or install error. May need internet or registry fix.

patterns.regex: (?i)(pip\s+install.*failed|ERROR: Could not find a version that satisfies the requirement)
patterns.human: Python's package manager couldn't install a dependency.
patterns.evidence_hint: pip install error. May need a different package name or version.

patterns.human: Homebrew couldn't install a tool.
patterns.evidence_hint: Homebrew formula not found or install failed.

patterns.human: A network request timed out during installation.
patterns.evidence_hint: Network timeout. May be transient — retry could help.

patterns.human: The installer couldn't reach the download server.
patterns.evidence_hint: DNS resolution failure. Check internet connection.

patterns.human: The installer couldn't connect to the server.
patterns.evidence_hint: Connection refused. Server may be down or blocked by firewall.

patterns.human: Your Vercel sign-in session has expired.
patterns.evidence_hint: Vercel auth token or session expiry.

patterns.human: Your GitHub sign-in session has expired.
patterns.evidence_hint: GitHub CLI auth token expiry.

patterns.human: An API key or session has expired.
patterns.evidence_hint: Generic expiry — context needed to determine which service.

patterns.human: The package server is limiting how many downloads you can make.
patterns.evidence_hint: npm rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.

patterns.human: The Python package server is limiting downloads.
patterns.evidence_hint: PyPI rate limit. Wait a moment and try again.

patterns.human: Your Node.js version is too old for this tool.
patterns.evidence_hint: Node version mismatch. Upgrade Node.js.

patterns.human: Your Python version is too old for this tool.
patterns.evidence_hint: Python version mismatch. Upgrade Python.

patterns.regex: (?i)(command not found:\s*git|git:\s*command not found|zsh:\s*command not found:\s*git|'git' is not recognized)
patterns.human: Git isn't installed on your computer.
patterns.evidence_hint: Git command not found. Install git first.

patterns.regex: (?i)(fatal:\s+could not read Username|fatal:\s+Authentication failed|Please tell me who you are.*git config)
patterns.human: Git is installed but you haven't set up your name and email yet.
patterns.evidence_hint: Git needs your name and email configured.

patterns.regex: (?i)(SSL certificate problem|unable to get local issuer certificate|self.signed certificate)
patterns.human: The installer couldn't verify the server's security certificate.
patterns.evidence_hint: SSL certificate error. May need to update CA certificates.

patterns.regex: (?i)(command not found:\s*docker|docker:\s*command not found|'docker' is not recognized)
patterns.human: Docker isn't installed on your computer.
patterns.evidence_hint: Docker command not found. Install Docker Desktop.
